seoTitle: Malua Bay vs Manar — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Malua Bay and Manar. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Malua Bay vs Manar: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Malua Bay and Manar.
heading: Malua Bay vs Manar — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Malua Bay, New South Wales and Manar, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Manar has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Malua Bay (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Malua Bay or Manar safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Malua Bay has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Manar scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Malua Bay scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Manar scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Malua Bay or Manar?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Manar has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
